output.title: Early reflections are your main issue
output.message: Install broadband panels at first reflection points before adding bass traps. Side walls and ceiling should be treated first. Prioritize symmetry and a stable stereo image for mixing.
output.note: Based on limited inputs. Upgrade later for full physics depth + diagrams.

output.title: Low-frequency buildup is your main issue
output.message: Start with corner bass traps (front corners first if possible). Then refine speaker/listening position before buying more gear. Prioritize symmetry and a stable stereo image for mixing.
